item.title: Hands Out Of Your Pockets For Officer Safety
item.dc:creator: BenDoverTeeHeeHee

item.title: Just a random dump of the stupid things I laugh at
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
7
8
9. The man's got talent, can't deny it
10
11
12. Blake Lively's husband at it again
13
14. And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine. If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too. It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Memes vol 250
item.description:
Have you SEEN my room?! One of you said it looks like my personality exploded on the walls and that’s the best description I’ve ever heard
My doctor told me I had a “toddler diet” (it’s true) and I’m always the last 2
I feel like I could post my room to Pinterest and have minor success- like it’s just batshit insanity up in here
I found this the day after I went to the beach with my friends. But we made a worm on a string out of sand so it was a win win
I say “what” without the question mark
This is my background. Billy is not having a great day :(
This might be the best thing I’ve ever read (and I’ve read Moon Knight by Lemire and Smallwood)
I read the cross one to my overly religious father and he got mad?? He was acting like it was blasphemy
Coricopat and Tantomile
Look at that face- he’s doing it to spite you I just know it
Once
You guys I don’t think I’m gonna marry Robert Irwin. That’s literally my only dream in life but he lives in Australia sooo (and he already has a girlfriend) Bindi the jungle girl was one of my favorite shows as a kid and I love their family. Also Bindi and Chandler’s wedding photos are ELITE!! The giraffes?! The snakes?!
This is so in character for both of them. Ted and Linda from Starkid musicals- Black Friday and The Guy Who Didn’t Like Musicals
You know that wolf turned some kids into furries
Oops sorry for not cropping
She was terrifying- slay Skye you killed it
He literally does this in 1992sies
Gabriel Picolo my beloved
Froggy and Liza Jane tax
Gidget tax (and Schroeder)
Coricopat tax- or Tantomile I can’t tell
Scruffy tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: How We Blocked a Coal Plant and Got a Solar Plant, Instead
item.description: I don't know who needs to hear this, but: A few years ago, I moved my family to a rural valley in the Western US. Beautiful. I found out a few weeks later that there were plans for a company from Las Vegas to build an enormous coal-fired power plant here, with 400-foot tall smokestacks, and all the massive pollution that'd come with it. I get the need for electricity, but it was a poor choice of location. I asked the Vegas ppl, off the record, why here? They said the rest of the state already violated clean air laws. Experts predicted a loss of 6-12 years of life for every resident if it was built. So, I started a website, email newsletter, got local cable TV access for broadcasting public hearings, and set up a magazine to get the word out that not everyone was okay with that. Others agreed. One local lady set up a voting initiative that power plants would need voters' approval. And because the group had no money to speak of, a couple of non-lawyer friends put a court challenge together. The case went to the state supreme court. We won. It turned out that the only evidence of research for the permit to pollute our valley was a scribbled approval on a post-it note. Some locals complained the local government had lost out on tax revenues. But a few months later, a solar power station was proposed by another company. That's part of it, in the photo. It's silent, clean, peaceful -- and everyone is living 6-12 years longer. Not all superheroes wear capes. Don't let people, including wealthy people, push you around. Save your worlds, my dudes, and you help save the whole world. (Below is what that area would have looked like, had the coal-fired power plant been built.)
item.dc:creator: MeanwhileInAmerica
